## Summary

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Validation

- [ ] Bash syntax validation passed
- [ ] ShellCheck passed
- [ ] Documentation was updated when necessary
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md was updated when necessary
- [ ] No credentials or private data were added
- [ ] Safety behavior remains unchanged unless clearly documented

## Safety

Confirm whether the change affects:

- Git operations
- Composer execution
- security auditing
- pull-request creation
- merging
- deployment
- database operations
